_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Incident management involves coordinating the response to incident reports, ensuring effective prioritisation, investigation and resolution.
reference_document_element_description: Manage program execution, including workstream coordination, issue resolution, scope change management, and executive status reporting.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-005 (OP, cosine: 0.438), SP-T-006 (SP, cosine: 0.405).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.5/10 (raw 0.452). Shared vocabulary: [management, resolution]. DDaT-only terms [coordinating, effective, ensuring, incident, investigation, involves] vs WIDAI-only terms [change, coordination, execution, executive, issue, manage] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.890 (P=0.893, R=0.887). Balanced P/R — the 15-word DDaT element and 15-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (100.0%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Incident management involves coordinating the response to incident reports, ensu" and "Manage program execution, including workstream coordination, issue resolution, s". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.518 > STS 0.452 (gap +0.066). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [management, resolution] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.5%. Shared tokens: [management, resolution]. DDaT-only: [coordinating, effective, ensuring, incident, investigation, involves]. WIDAI-only: [change, coordination, execution, executive, issue, manage].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 100.0% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.
